eat-them-right-out-of-the-pot-vegetarian.name: eat Them Right Out Of The Pot' Vegetarian Collard Greens

ingredients.prep: halved lengthwise, or more to taste

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Fill a large stockpot halfway with water; add vinegar, seafood seasoning, and olive oil. Bring liquid to a boil.
Mix collard greens, jalapeno peppers, and garlic into boiling water; return to a boil. Cover stockpot, reduce heat to medium-low, and simmer until greens are very tender, 3 to 4 hours.
Drain water from greens and mash garlic cloves; season with salt and pepper.

english-pea-hummus.name: English Pea Hummus

ingredients.prep: plus 1/2 teaspoon or more to taste

instructions: In a large saucepan over high heat, bring 3 quarts water and 1/2 cup kosher salt to a boil. Prepare an ice bath of 3 quarts water and ice with 1/2 cup kosher salt stirred in until dissolved. Add the shelled English peas to the boiling water and cook until tender, 2 to 4 minutes. When sweet and tender, immediately remove the peas from the boiling water with a slotted spoon and transfer to the ice bath to stop the cooking. Let sit until the peas are fully cooled, 1 to 2 minutes, then drain.

Combine blanched peas, green garlic, mint, chervil, lemon, olive oil, 1/2 teaspoon salt, and the pepper in a food processor and puree until smooth. Taste for seasoning and adjust as needed. Serve with crudités or Crackers.

enjoy-this-jerky-and-foie-roll-comedera.name: Enjoy This Jerky And Foie Roll
enjoy-this-jerky-and-foie-roll-comedera.original_name: Disfruta este rollito de cecina y foie
instructions: Inicia la receta y en un bol, coloca el foie, la cucharada de canela y la otra cucharada de tomillo. Mezcla muy bien hasta que todos los ingredientes se unan.
Now, get your necks and clear them up on a clear board.
Put the motif with the spices in a pastry sleeve to make it easier to fill the necks.
Fill the necks and place a portion of the foe and spices mixture at one of the tipples.
Wrap his necks and form a little roll. Serve and decorate with olive oil, basil leaves and a fruit syrup.

enjoy-this-turkey-stuffed-with-rice-and-.name: Enjoy This Turkey Stuffed With Rice And Pine Nuts
enjoy-this-turkey-stuffed-with-rice-and-.original_name: Disfruta de este pavo relleno con arroz y piñones
instructions: Separa un poco la piel del pavo.
En un bol, incorpora la mantequilla, las hierbas provenzales, sal y pimienta. Mezcla muy bien.
Unta el pavo con la mezcla anterior, por debajo de la piel, sobre todo en los muslos y en la pechuga. Reserva.
Peel the onion and cut into small pieces. Flettle his garlic teeth and snap his parsley.
Warm up an olive oil casserole and pour garlic with onion for a few minutes. Incorporates rice, sauona with salt and mixture. Jumped some rice for another two minutes.
Vierte el agua, mezcla y cocina hasta que quede suave y al dente. Apaga y deja reposar.
Preheat the oven at 180 ° C
In a bowl, it incorporates pineapples, shredded parsley and rice at temperature. That's a good mix.
Rellena el pavo con esta mezcla y ata las patas con hilo pabilo.
Coloca el pavo en una bandeja, vierte el vino blanco y las dos hojas de laurel.
Fold the plate with an aluminium paper and bordnea for 2 hours at 180 ° C
After that time, remove the foil paper and get up to 200 ° C and finish baking for about 30 minutes till it's pink and golden.
Una vez listo, retira del horno, deja reposar y disfruta.

espresso-granita.name: Espresso Granita

ingredients.item: Hot espresso or very strong coffee

instructions: Stir espresso, 1/2 cup sugar, and vanilla in a medium bowl until sugar dissolves. Pour into a 9x9x2" metal baking pan. Freeze for 1 hour. Stir, mashing any frozen parts with the back of a fork. Cover; freeze until firm, about 2 hours. Using a fork, scrape granita vigorously to form icy flakes. DO AHEAD Can be made 3 days ahead. Cover tightly with foil; keep frozen. Give it a quick scrape before serving.
Beat cream and remaining 1 tablespoon sugar in a large bowl until peaks form. Divide granita among bowls or glasses. Top with whipped cream and garnish with chocolate shavings.

ever-rice-stuffing.name: Ever Rice Stuffing

ingredients.item: Uncle ben's® long grain & wild rice original recipe

instructions: In a saucepan, saute rice in butter until brown, stirring frequently.
Stir in contents of seasoning packet and orange zest.
Mix together the orange juice and enough water to equal 2-1/3 cups water and add to rice.
Bring to a boil, cover and simmer until liquid is absorbed, about 25 minutes.
Stir in toasted pecans.

extra-virgin-olive-oil-brownies-with-a-m.name: Extra Virgin Olive Oil Brownies With A Mocha Swirl

ingredients.item: Colavita® premium selection extra virgin olive oil

instructions: Preheat the oven to 350º. Brush an 9-inch metal baking pan with oil. Line with parchment paper and brush the parchment with oil.
Chop the chocolate into small pieces.
Bring about an inch of water to a simmer in a medium pot. Place a medium heatproof bowl over the pot of simmering water. Add the chocolate and cook, stirring, until the chocolate is just melted.
Carefully remove the bowl of melted chocolate from the heat (the bowl may be hot). While whisking, slowly pour the olive oil into the melted chocolate, whisking until fully incorporated.
Add the granulated and brown sugars to the chocolate mixture and whisk to combine.
Crack three of the eggs into the batter and whisk well until completely incorporated.
Whisk the cocoa and salt into the batter. Then gently fold the flour into the batter.

In another medium bowl, whisk the cream cheese with the remaining ⅓ cup of sugar and the espresso powder. Crack the remaining egg into a small bowl and separate the yolk from the whites. Add the yolk to the cream cheese mixture and whisk until fully combined. Reserve the white for another use.

Using a spatula, scrape the brownie mixture into the prepared baking pan. Smooth the top. Dollop the cream cheese mixture over the brownie in the prepared pan. Then use a toothpick or wooden skewer to swirl.
Bake the brownie until puffed and lightly golden and the edges start to pull away from the pan, about 55 minutes. Let cool. Sprinkle the brownies with flaky sea salt, cut into squares, and serve.

extra-dry-martini.name: Extra-dry Martini
instructions: {'step': '1', 'description': 'Fill a glass beaker or cocktail shaker with ice and pour in 15ml dry vermouth. Stir 15 seconds, then let sit 30 seconds. Stir again, then strain out and discard vermouth.'}
{'step': '2', 'description': 'Pour 50-60g high-quality gin or vodka into beaker and stir 30 seconds. Let sit 30 seconds, then stir again 30 seconds.'}
{'step': '3', 'description': 'Let sit another 30 seconds, then stir again quickly. Strain cocktail into a chilled glass.'}
{'step': '4', 'description': '(Garnish with a lemon twist or olives.)'}

4. Add and mix the peppers, grazed tomatoes and bay leaf.
5. Add water and taste salt and pepper.
6. Cook on high fire until boiling.
7. After boiling, cut the gold.
8. Take the service plate after pilav brewed.
9. Decorate with Maydanoz leaves and serve hot.
